title: opuntia polyacantha subsp. erinacea
intro: Opuntia polyacantha subsp. erinacea, also known as the "prickly pear cactus," is a species of cactus that belongs to the Opuntia genus. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Opuntia polyacantha subsp. erinacea include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Opuntia polyacantha subsp. erinacea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat burns, cuts, and skin irritations.
